source_text: Hello. My name is Tom. I am ten years old. I like reading books.
music_prompt: Bright children's pop, cheerful classroom sing-along, female lead vocal, clear pronunciation, light drums, ukulele, easy chorus, 100 BPM
lyrics:
[Intro]
Hello, hello!
Come and sing with me!

[Verse]
Hello, hello, my name is Tom,
Ten years old and feeling strong.
I love books from page to page,
Reading stories every day.

[Chorus]
Hello, Tom, hello, Tom,
Sing it loud and sing along.
Read a book and smile all day,
Learn in English, laugh and play.

scenes.caption: Tom waves hello in class.
scenes.lyric_excerpt: Hello, hello, my name is Tom
scenes.image_prompt: Children's book illustration, bright pastel classroom, one cheerful boy named Tom with short brown hair and blue school uniform waving hello, big friendly eyes, clean outlines, 16:9, child-safe, consistent character design.

scenes.caption: Tom shows he is ten years old.
scenes.lyric_excerpt: Ten years old and feeling strong
